exact_next_action: When the calibration output completes, rerun this checkpoint and then rerun the response-window acceptance, retained-route, and campaign-status certificates.  Even a passing calibration must be followed by scalar-pole and canonical-Higgs identity gates.
proposal_allowed_reason: Finite-source-linearity is response support only and does not close scalar LSZ or canonical-Higgs identity.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not treat source-coordinate dE/ds as physical dE/dh
does not supply scalar LSZ pole derivative, FV/IR, model-class, or canonical-Higgs identity
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
verdict: The multi-radius calibration output is present and supports a finite zero-source intercept fit for the source-coordinate FH response.  This is bounded response-window support only: it does not supply scalar LSZ pole control, FV/IR/model-class closure, or canonical-Higgs/source-overlap identity.
